headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on IQVIA Holdings, Raises Price Target to $230
summary: Mizuho  analyst Ann Hynes   maintains IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $215 to $230.
